scripts.build: npm run build -w @boardcad/core && npm run build -w boardcad-web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @boardcad/core && npm run test -w boardcad-web
scripts.lint: npm run build -w @boardcad/core && npm run typecheck -w boardcad-web && npm run check:no-tauri -w boardcad-web
scripts.verify: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && npm run web:bundle-check
